user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — Pass 11 (Observability & logging). Forensic pass over structured logging, Sentry, PII discipline in logs, durable receipts, env-secret exposure. Verdict PASS, no code change. logStructuredEvent (lib/utils/structured-logger.ts) hashes userId (sha256/12) so no raw id reaches logs; Sentry wired via instrumentation.ts + instrumentation-client.ts (DSN in env); durable tkg_actions receipts; scoring hot path proven metadata-only by scorer-metadata-egress + cross-source-life-context-egress tests (both green); only .env.example + .env.local.example are git-tracked (all real env files gitignored — no secret leak). Observations: O-11.1 logStructuredEvent does not recursively sanitize the free-form details object (208 call sites, caller-disciplined; no leak found, future redaction-lint suggested); O-11.2 stale local .env.pr142.preview*/.env.production.truth clutter the repo root but are gitignored (local hygiene only). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Pass 11 observability record (docs/backend/OBSERVABILITY_AUDIT.md) + control-plane only. Documentation pass; observability verified healthy, no source change.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/scorer-metadata-egress.test.ts lib/briefing/__tests__/cross-source-life-context-egress.test.ts
required_browser_proof: N/A — observability/logging audit; structured-logger read (userId hashed), Sentry init files confirmed, egress tests green, git ls-files shows no tracked .env secrets.
acceptance_condition: Observability passes: structured queryable events with hashed userId (no raw PII), Sentry wired, durable receipts, hot path metadata-only (egress tests green), no committed secrets. Record in docs/backend/OBSERVABILITY_AUDIT.md.
stop_condition: Stop when Pass 11 record is up as a PR and merged; continue to Pass 12 (governance/memory meta-fix) — the final audit pass.
next_command: Continue Master Audit #445: Pass 12 (governance/memory meta-fix) — final pass; then post the Master Audit completion summary on #445.
